text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
All right, team. Please inspect the cleaning
equipment in your allotted areas.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I need to finish quickly so I can get to training...)

text_block_list.name: Committee Member
text_block_list.text: N-not good, Ayabe! The area we're in charge of—

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The number of brooms listed in our inventory
doesn't match the number counted. We need to
search for the missing equipment.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Walking through the hall, I spot Admire Vega
hard at work with her general affairs committee
members. It looks like there's some sort of
problem.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Not really... Same problems as always.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Normally, the general affairs committee doesn't
have any problems doing inventory of the
cleaning supplies.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The students at Tracen Academy are
well-behaved, and cleaning staff come to the
school regularly. So our numbers not matching
what's in the inventory...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Emphasis on shouldn't. But there isn't much point in thinking about hypotheticals.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Let's just hurry and finish.

text_block_list.name: Committee Member
text_block_list.text: You're unfazed as always, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Yes, I respect her approach to our group's work.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's why everyone in our committee secretly
sings her praises.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Everyone calls her "the Professional."

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's go and help her.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: "Act with efficiency."

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! I can't get the ball out of the tree even with
this broom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whack!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
We've secured the ball. Brilliant work using a
small stone to knock it down.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it was so awesome! Like... Special Move—Rising Arrow!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Problem solved? Then pass me the broom.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: "Gain control without creating resistance."

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sure, it can't fly now, but I can make it fly, 'cause I know magic!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If it can't fly, it must be a normal broomstick.
Don't you have some witchy way to tell the
difference?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, you're right! Hehe. ♪ I have to go find a magic broom!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
We've secured two brooms. Great job going
along without hurting her feelings.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Finally, "Finish swiftly and flawlessly."

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The number and details match the list. Which
means we're all done, right?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but I fear we pushed most of the work on to
her again.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I just want to finish faster.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm simply carrying out my duties. That's what
you're all doing as well.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. But it takes more than simple
willpower to work like you do.
choice_data_list: It takes the power of the Professional!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. But it takes more than simple
willpower to work like you do.
choice_data_list: It takes the power of the Professional!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? "The Professional"?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's left an impression on you too,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
She's able to get the maximum benefit from
minimum input with the sensibility to not flaunt
her skill.
choice_data_list: She really lives up to her title!
She really lives up to her title!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Wait a minute! What do you mean by "title"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I explain the reasoning behind her
meritorious name, she appears taken aback but
remains silent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching the committee's activities today shows
me that checking equipment may be a simple
task, but it requires patience. When I tell Admire
Vega...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...It's the same with your job, no?
choice_data_list: And you were so nice to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: L-like I said, it's the same with—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Whatever, I'm going home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she didn't elaborate, I get the feeling
that she actually appreciates the work that I do.
